title: Timely Recovery
body:
> If you like the design of the Recovery Compass and never being late, this pack is for you.
> 
This resource pack transforms the standard watch design into a stylized golden version inspired by the Recovery Compass.

![Sample](https://i.postimg.cc/4xmHbSJb/Timely-Recovery.gif)

Contact: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/wh33zy
